title: Samsung Galaxy M15 and Galaxy Xcover7 are now getting the One UI 8.5 update
description: Samsung is continuing to roll out the update to One UI 8.5 to its older devices, as it has been doing for several weeks now. Today, the latest Samsung smartphones to be graced with One UI 8.5 are the Galaxy M15 and the Galaxy Xcover7. [#InlinePriceWidget,12833,1#] [#InlinePriceWidget,12784,1#] The M15 is receiving the update in Korea, as firmware version M156SKSU8DZE4, with the May 2026 security patch level included. The Xcover7, on the other hand, is seeing the new software in Malaysia, the Philippines, Thailand, and Vietnam, with the identifier G556BXXUFEZEB. Samsung Galaxy...

title: OnePlus said to be working on a new line of entry-level smartphones
description: According to a tipster on X, OnePlus is currently working on an entirely new smartphone product line for India. This will be the N series, and the devices in this family will be priced under INR 20,000 ($209). Thus, this will be OnePlus' entry-level line, sitting below the mid-range Nord series which itself is below the flagship roster. The OnePlus N series will comprise "multiple smartphones tailored for different tiers", the source says. With pricing under INR 20,000, the OnePlus N devices will compete directly with Redmi, Realme, and Poco. OnePlus Nord CE6 Lite If you're...

title: Samsung Galaxy Tab S12 Ultra's battery capacity could disappoint you
description: Samsung is expected to be launching the Galaxy Tab S12 Ultra alongside the Galaxy Tab S12+ later this year (possibly in September, which is when its predecessor got official in 2025). The device will allegedly have the exact same battery capacity as the Tab S11 Ultra, according to a new report. Unfortunately, Samsung has decided not to go past 11,600 mAh for whatever reason. Since it's literally the same battery pack, it's also very likely to top out at 45W wired charging capacity, just like the S11 Ultra. Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra Interestingly, the Galaxy Tab S12+ is said to...

title: Apple unveils next-generation Apple Intelligence, here are the features
description: The headline feature Apple unveiled at its Worldwide Developers Conference today is undoubtedly Siri AI, but the company has also revealed some other Apple Intelligence features that are coming to iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, watchOS 27, and visionOS 27. The Photos app now "taps into more powerful image models" to let you make edits, "while respecting the original moment as it was captured", Apple says. With Spatial Reframing, you can touch and drag a photo and preview a perspective shift in real time, thanks to "Apple's deep understanding of spatial models" on the Vision Pro...

title: Here's what's new in iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
description: At its Worldwide Developers Conference, Apple talked about the upcoming iOS 27 and iPadOS 27. Both of these are available in preview for developers today, and they will be in open beta for anyone to try starting next month. They will then be released to the public this fall. The headline feature for both iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 is, of course, Siri AI, the company's long-awaited AI chatbot that's deeply integrated into these systems, complete with its own app. There are also a bunch of other new AI features that Apple has grouped into the "next-gen Apple Intelligence" umbrella. Aside from...

title: Infinix GT 50 Pro review
Siri AI is official for iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, watchOS 27, and visionOS 27
description: Well, the rumors were true once again. Today at its Worldwide Developers Conference, Apple unveiled what it's calling the "next generation of Apple Intelligence", complete with the very long-awaited revamped Siri, which is called Siri AI. Siri AI is based on Google's Gemini models, is much more conversational, features on-device processing, and also uses Apple's Private Cloud Compute when it needs to use servers, which ensures that your personal data isn't stored nor made accessible to Apple or anyone else. There's a new Siri app which remembers your past chats, and in iOS the new Siri...

title: Samsung will give you a new way to access Bixby in One UI 9
description: According to a new report, one of the new features in the upcoming One UI 9 based on Android 17 will be a new way to summon Bixby. Yes, Bixby is still alive and Samsung shows no intention of getting rid of it even though we have to assume its usage numbers are lower and lower with every year that goes by. Anyway, if you are a die-hard Bixby fan, in One UI 9 you will be able to talk to it by simply picking up your phone and bringing it to your face. Bixby will automatically activate based on this gesture and you can immediately start talking to it without having to say "Bixby" or "Hi,...

title: Microsoft unveils Xbox Series X25 Limited Edition and X25 controller for the 25th anniversary
description: On November 15, 2001, Bill Gates (and The Rock) unveiled a new gaming console called the “Xbox”. Later this year, the Xbox line will celebrate its 25th anniversary and Microsoft is ready with a special edition of the Series X. The Xbox Series X25 Limited Edition ditches the black and white colors of the base Series X and dresses up in translucent green – for those who weren’t around back then, translucent green was the coolest in the early 2000s. Also, the iconic X logo on the console will light up in green when you power it up. That’s not all, the announcement says that you will also...

title: Samsung Galaxy S26 FE design leaked via online certification listing
description: Samsung is expected to unveil the Galaxy S25 FE successor this September, if the company follows its usual launch schedule. Ahead of its debut, the Galaxy S26 FE has been spotted on the Wireless Power Consortium (WPC). Unlike a recent leak, which showed the phone in a protective case, the latest listing offers a clearer look at its design. A real-life image included in the WPC certification listing shows the Galaxy S26 FE in a gray finish. The listing also confirms the device carries the model number SM-S741. The image suggests that the Galaxy S26 FE will closely resemble the...

title: Apple WWDC 26: what to expect
description: Apple’s WWDC 2026 starts later today – this is a software-focused event, so we don’t expect new hardware. However, Apple users wouldn’t want to miss it as several major changes are coming to their devices. Here’s an overview of what to expect. You can watch the WWDC livestream here. The event starts at 10:00 AM PT (7:00 PM CEST). New, smarter Siri Siri may be one of the earlier digital assistants, but it has fallen off in terms of capabilities. This is why it’s getting a full reboot – Apple has partnered with Nvidia and Google to rebuild it with modern LLM AI at its...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 will use the Exynos 2600 in these regions
description: Last year, the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip7 was available exclusively with the Exynos 2500 chipset – this included markets like the US that traditionally see Snapdragon-based devices. We’ve already heard that its sequel will not repeat this strategy and will use a mix of Exynos and Snapdragon chips instead. Now a report from Korean publication The Bell has drawn the borders on the global map that divide the Exynos regions from the Snapdragon regions. The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 will use the Exynos 2600 in South Korea and Europe. Every other region is getting a Qualcomm chip, though we still don’t...

title: New leak puts the Redmi K100 Pro battery at 8,000mAh (or higher)
description: Last week, Digital Chat Station posted a fairly detailed list of specs for the Redmi K100 Pro. Now the leakster has refined the details somewhat. The biggest change is to the claimed battery stats – originally reported as being a 9,000mAh or bigger, the latest post from DCS says that the battery capacity will start with an 8. In other words, it will be between 8,000mAh and 9,000mAh. This might still make it the biggest battery in the K-series yet, but it’s no longer certain. The Redmi K90 Max (there was no “K90 Pro”) has an 8,550mAh battery. Anyway, the old post put the wired...

title: Watch Apple's WWDC 26 keynote livestream here
description: Apple’s WWDC is set to kick off in a few hours with a keynote presentation. CEO Tim Cook is likely to open the event, which could mark his final WWDC keynote at the helm of Apple. Later this year, Apple’s Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering, John Ternus will succeed Cook as CEO. The Worldwide Developers Conference keynote is scheduled to begin at 10:00 AM PT (7:00 PM CEST). During the presentation, Apple is expected to unveil the next generation of its software platforms, including iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, tvOS 27, watchOS 27, and visionOS 27. Apple will livestream the...

title: vivo X Fold6 will run on OriginOS 6 Fold, real-life images leak
description: vivo has officially begun teasing its next-generation foldable smartphone, the vivo X Fold6. Senior vivo executives have started revealing key details about the device on Weibo, offering an early look at what to expect. Meanwhile, real-world images of the vivo X Fold6 have surfaced online after the device was allegedly spotted in the wild. According to vivo, the foldable will debut with the new OriginOS 6 Fold, which will include an upgraded Atomic Workbench designed to improve multitasking and productivity. The software will also offer an enhanced AI assistant along with a suite of...

title: Xiaomi 17T series lands in China, 17T gets battery boost
description: Following their global launch last month, the Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro have now made their way to the Chinese market with one major upgrade for the vanilla 17T. It gets the same 7,000mAh Si/C battery as the Pro model. For those keeping track at home, that’s a 500mAh boost compared to the global version. Charging is still capped at 67W. Outside of the battery boost on the 17T, and the additional 16GB RAM option on the 17T Pro, the Chinese variants offer the same core specs as the international models. Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro key specs (machine translated) The 17T gets a 6.59-inch...

title: OnePlus Turbo 6X and Turbo 6X Pro to debut on June 10
description: Last week, OnePlus revealed the design and key features of its upcoming Turbo 6X series. The company has now confirmed the launch date for the Turbo 6X and Turbo 6X Pro in China. According to an announcement on OnePlus' official Weibo account, the Turbo 6X series will debut in China on June 10. OnePlus has already disclosed several key specifications of both smartphones, and pre-reservations are now live through the company's official online store in China. The OnePlus Turbo 6X is confirmed to feature the MediaTek Dimensity 7360 Super chipset, a 7,000mAh battery, and an LCD...

title: Weekly deals: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra price drops, the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL is still cheaper
description: As a reminder, Amazon pulled Prime Day forward this year and it is now scheduled for June 23-26. The retailer already has early Prime Day deals that you may want to have a peek at. In the meantime, here are the standard deals – no subscription required. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 512GB is down to $1,220, which is a bit lower than it was a couple of weeks ago. The phone is clearly the big seller this generation as the other two S26 models get no discounts at all. We’re highlighting the 512GB model in particular as the 256GB version has a noticeably smaller discount, so it’s only $45 less...

title: Sony 1000X The Collexion review
description: 10 years ago, Sony announced its MDR-1000X noise-canceling headphones in a bid to challenge Bose and its QuietComfort lineup. And they did just that with the 1000X series going on to become synonymous with class-leading noise canceling and audio quality. With ten years under their belt, Sony decided to launch a special edition of its flagship ANC headphones dubbed Sony 1000X The Collexion. With a more premium build, custom drivers and sound tuning from mastering experts, these cans are clearly meant to stand out from the regular WH-1000XM6. But they also come with a $200/€200 price...

title: iPhone Fold photo leak, Nvidia RTX Spark is official, Week 23 in review
description: Another week, another couple of foldable iPhone stories. The first is a big one, coming straight from Ice Universe; it's a photo of the device in the wild. The photo shows the White/Silver finish of the inaugural foldable and confirms its stocky shape. Another rumor claims the foldable iPhone will have a vapor chamber for cooling. It's not surprising, given that the iPhone Pro models have a vapor chamber. Motorola unveiled the Edge (2026) for the US and Canadian markets. The phone brings a smaller 6.3-inch display than its predecessor and will go on sale on June 11 with a $600 price...
